title: Realistic Survival - Updated
description: An unofficial fork of Realistic survival that aims to / tries to always support the latest version
body:
# Realistic Survival – Updated

## 1.21.11 Support soon!

## Known issues:

ViaVersion may cause a lot of errors and issues. As for now if you want to use this RS fork - please don't use ViaVersion. I will try to fix it but I can't promise anything! Sorry-

---

*At some point in future I'm planning to add some new features and tweaks to this plugin and completely rework it. Stay tuned for that! Until then I will still provide quick patches & support for latest mc versions*

## Roadmap:
- 🔸 Optimize the plugin
- 🔸 Make it Paper API Friendly
- ❌ More features 👀

---

This is an **unofficial fork** of the *Realistic Survival* plugin.  
The goal of this fork is to **patch and update** the plugin to remain compatible with the **latest Minecraft versions** (e.g., **1.21.4** and **1.21.5**).

> This is a **temporary solution** primarily intended for server owners who want to run the plugin on newer Minecraft versions while the original author is unavailable or hasn't released updates yet.  
> Only **minor compatibility patches** and basic testing are done to ensure it works, with no major changes to the original plugin’s functionality.


~~In short- Originally this supposed to be a build only for my own server but I decided to share it with ya all~~

---

### Original Project

You can find the original project by ValMobile here:  
[Realistic Survival (GitHub)](https://github.com/ValMobile/RealisticSurvival)

[Realistic Survival (Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/realisticsurvival)

---
